text: Morning Jarvis, help me plan my day. What's on the calendar?
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Wednesday, April 30. You have a 1:1 with Anika at 2 PM, and Lily needs to be picked up from daycare.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: Hey Jarvis, Ethan is working on a school assignment at the table. He is studying hard for the school spelling bee tomorrow. We want to make sure he stays motivated.
title: Kids School Update

text: Understood. That's wonderful. Spelling bees build great vocabulary. I can quiz him on the word list if he wants. I'll update the calendar reminder.
title: Jarvis Kids School Response

text: Quick update: Looking over our mortgage options. They requested our W-2 and bank statements. Every bit of savings helps.
title: Finance Update

text: Logged that. I've compiled the spreadsheet numbers. I have prepared a checklist of documents in your shared folder. I'll update the budget sheet.
title: Jarvis Finance Response

text: Quick log: Prepping for the stakeholder meeting later today. VP Greg Holloway is complaining about the infrastructure costs for CareConnect. This could be a blocker for the Vertex Health launch.
title: Work Update

text: Understood. That sounds critical. We can present a cost-benefit analysis showing that dropping these optimizations will cost more in support tickets. Should we schedule a calendar slot to do a deep dive?
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Got hyperfocused on my workstation coding. Lights will pulse red for X-class solar flares. Really satisfying to build this myself.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Understood. I've indexed the research notes. Connected NOAA weather APIs to your lights. Neat space coding hack, Mike! Let me know if you want to run testing scripts.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Just wanted to mention that ethan and Lily are playing with Cooper in the backyard. Ethan wants to play Roblox instead of doing his reading. Hope tomorrow is a bit easier.
title: Parenting Update

text: Interesting. Screen time is always a negotiation. A 'homework first, then Roblox' rule helps balance screen time. Let's keep tracking what works.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Hey Jarvis, I'm reviewing the scheduling portal specs for Vertex Health. The database query on the patient onboarding schema is running very slow. Anika is doing a great job managing the feedback.
title: Work Update

text: Got it, Mike. Here is what I recommend. I recommend analyzing the query execution plan to see if a compound index can speed up patient onboarding. I can add this optimization to the backlog.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Quick update: Took Lily to her medical checkup. I only got 6 hours of sleep last night. Feeling good about my routine.
title: Health Update

text: Sure thing! That's good medical feedback. Rest is critical. I suggest setting a bedtime reminder for 10 PM. I'll save the mileage logs.
title: Jarvis Health Response

text: Jarvis, Ethan is working on a school assignment at the table. He is asking lots of questions about exoplanet atmospheric compositions. He is really putting in the effort.
title: Kids School Update

text: School projects are fun. That's a great interest. I can summarize the atmosphere of Venus in a kid-friendly way. I can quiz him whenever he is ready.
title: Jarvis Kids School Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Sarah and I are looking at home listings in Frisco online. They requested our W-2 and bank statements. Will talk this over with Sarah.
title: Finance Update

text: Budget tracking is updated. I have prepared a checklist of documents in your shared folder. I'll update the budget sheet.
title: Jarvis Finance Response

text: Working on the roadmap slides for Q4. Greg Holloway wants to drop patient onboarding to save time, but Anika thinks it is essential. This could be a blocker for the Vertex Health launch.
title: Work Update

text: Understood. Here is what I recommend. I suggest a phased rollout. Shipping a basic version of patient onboarding now and iterating later is a good compromise. I can prep some talking points for your meeting with Anika.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Quick update: Wrote a custom vector memory index tool. I quantized a local LLM to run in memory. Nice to combine space science and coding.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Sure thing! Your hyperfocus projects are impressive. Quantizing 70B models is heavy coding. I've saved settings in your scratchpad. Remember to get some sleep!
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Jarvis, Lily had a tough time at bedtime tonight. Lily fell asleep immediately holding her stuffed elephant. They keep us on our toes.
title: Parenting Update

text: Logged that. Bedtime can be a challenge. A calm routine makes all the difference. Nice contrast to the tantrums. I've updated the grocery list.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Quick log: Analyzing the system logs from yesterday's release. Anika Patel did a deep competitor analysis showing MyChart has billing integration. Hopefully we can align on this during the stakeholder review.
title: Work Update

text: Got it, Mike. Got it, Mike. This competitor data is a powerful lever. You can use it to justify keeping billing integration in the MVP. We should review this with Greg tomorrow morning.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Jarvis, Tracking my weekly fitness metrics. I ran 5 miles but my knee felt tight. Hope the allergies calm down.
title: Health Update

text: Interesting. I've logged your vitals. Great run! Remember to stretch your hamstrings to help the knee. I've saved the checkup notes.
title: Jarvis Health Response

text: Quick journal entry for tonight. Lots of communication with Greg and Anika today. Got document checklists ready for the mortgage refinance. CareConnect prep is moving along. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: Journal logged, Mike. Rest well and I'll see you tomorrow.
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
